name: Rogan Josh
keywords: indian ethnic entertain easy main dish
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds lamb or beef stew meat
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the ginger, garlic, and 4 tablespoons water in a blender. Blend until smooth.
2. Heat oil in a wok over medium-high heat. Brown meat cubes in several batches; set aside.
3. Add cardamoms, bay leaves, cloves, peppercorns, and cinnamon to hot oil. Stir once; let cloves puff and bay leaves change color.
4. Add onions and fry until medium brown, about 5 minutes.
5. Incorporate ginger-garlic paste and stir for 30 seconds.
6. Add fried meat cubes and juices; stir for 30 seconds.
7. Add 1/6 of yogurt and stir until well combined.
8. Gradually add remaining yogurt, a tablespoon at a time, stirring until fully incorporated.
9. Add the rest of the broth (a bit more for beef than lamb). Bring to boil, scraping browned spices from pot sides.
10. Cover; reduce heat to low and simmer for 1 hour with lamb or 2 hours with beef, stirring every 10 minutes.
11. When meat is tender, increase heat to medium and boil off excess liquid until sauce thickens.
12. Remove fat; season with garam masala and black pepper before serving.
